exercises.title: Variational Circuit Simulator
exercises.description: Implement a variational quantum circuit for pricing

testCases.input:
vp = VariationalPricer(10)
data = [(np.array([1.0, 0.2, 0.05]), 10.5)]
result = vp.train(data, 10)
'final_loss' in result

exercises.title: Quantum Portfolio Pricing
exercises.description: Price a portfolio of options using quantum parallelism concepts
hints: Sum portfolio value under each scenario

testCases.input:
pp = QuantumPortfolioPricer()
opts = [{'strike': 100, 'T': 1.0, 'is_call': True, 'quantity': 10}]
result = pp.price_portfolio(opts, 100, 0.05, 0.2)
result['total_value'] > 0
